title: Icon Legend against Dates
excerpt:
When using icons against dates it would be useful to include a customisable legend to explain what each of the icons against the dates mean. Ideally this unique per board. 
This would expand the functionality of dates / …

posts.author: ash.heron (Ashley)
posts.cookedHtml:
When using icons against dates it would be useful to include a customisable legend to explain what each of the icons against the dates mean. Ideally this unique per board.

This would expand the functionality of dates / icons dramatically.

Dates & Icons1446×210 24.8 KB


Legend343×847 27.2 KB

posts.author: thetrio84 (Alex K)
posts.cookedHtml:
Additionally, being able to automatically add icons depending on a condition as here would be great.

So, the legend could be custom as above, or show that each icon is set with a custom time/automation. (E.g. if deadline is less than 2 weeks away, set orange icon etc.)
